issues.description: Questions lack accompanying text passages - students cannot cite evidence without source material
While questions target RI.6.1 skills, they reference undefined texts making standard implementation incomplete
Questions refer to specific articles, stories, and experiments without providing the actual texts
Question complexity appears appropriate for grade 6, but cannot fully assess without source texts
Answer key provides responses to non-existent passages, making validation impossible
Template structure and formatting are properly implemented
Topics appear culturally neutral and accessible, though full assessment requires source texts
